message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class "Vehiculo" {
  + marca: string
  + modelo: string
  + velocidadMax: number
  + encender(): void
  + apagar(): void
  + acelerar(): void
  + frenar(): void
}

class "Recargable" {
  + autonomia: string
  + cargar(number): void
  + descargar(number): void
}

class "BiciElectrica" {
  + pedalear(): void
}

class "AutoElectrico" {
  + manejoAutonomo(): void
}

class "MonopatinElectrico" {
  + ajustarAltura(): void
  + plegar(): void
}

class "VehiculoRecargable" {
}

"Vehiculo" <|-- "VehiculoRecargable"
"VehiculoRecargable" <|-- "Recargable"
"VehiculoRecargable" ..> "BiciElectrica"
"VehiculoRecargable" ..> "AutoElectrico"
"VehiculoRecargable" ..> "MonopatinElectrico"

note left of "Vehiculo"
  I
end note

note left of "Recargable"
  I
end note

note left of "BiciElectrica"
  C
end note

note left of "AutoElectrico"
  C
end note

note left of "MonopatinElectrico"
  C
end note

note left of "VehiculoRecargable"
  I
end note

@enduml
